key.name: prefs-default-width
key.description: The default width for the preferences window.

key.name: prefs-default-height
key.description: The default height for the preferences window.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Determines when the status indicator is visible. 0: Only when active, 1: Always, 2: Never.

key.name: indicator-position
key.description: The position of the indicator in the panel.

key.name: indicator-position-index
key.description: The index of the indicator relative to other items.

key.name: indicator-position-max
key.description: The maximum allowed value for the indicator position.
